Hearing On Defendant Brian Gagnon'S Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- BRIAN GAGNON AND JOHNNY VAN HORN II, TEL. NO. 673-2269 DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - (HEARING PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON APRIL 25, 2008)- THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS BRIAN GAGNON AND JOHNNY VAN HORN II MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S DECLARE THAT SERVICE DID NOT OCCUR UNTIL MARCH 29, 2008, THE NON-REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER OFFERS NO DETAILS OF SERVICE, AND DEFENDANTS MOVED PROMPTLY FOR RELIEF. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/LB
